channel.title: Bread Lab
channel.description: Home bread baking experiments with a scientific approach

item.title: Rye-wheat bread 60/40
item.description: A simple 60/40 rye-wheat control loaf on one rye starter, without malt, spices, or scald, to isolate starter activity, proofing, and crumb.
item.dc:creator: Dmitry Platonov
item.content:encoded: A simple 60/40 rye-wheat control loaf on one rye starter, without malt, spices, or scald, to isolate starter activity, proofing, and crumb.

item.title: Tangzhong white bread
item.description: Soft hearth-style white bread with tangzhong, cold fermentation, hand steam, and internal temperature control.
item.dc:creator: Dmitry Platonov
item.content:encoded: Soft hearth-style white bread with tangzhong, cold fermentation, hand steam, and internal temperature control.

item.title: Dark bread with 80% rye flour
item.description: German-style dark bread with 80% rye flour, a scald, Brotgewürz, and three-stage rye sourdough refreshment.
item.dc:creator: Dmitry Platonov
item.content:encoded: German-style dark bread with 80% rye flour, a scald, Brotgewürz, and three-stage rye sourdough refreshment.

item.title: Borodinsky Sourdough Bread
item.description: Classic Russian scalded rye with coriander and red rye malt. Version 3.0: more salt, refined hydration.
item.dc:creator: Dmitry Platonov
item.content:encoded: Classic Russian scalded rye with coriander and red rye malt. Version 3.0: more salt, refined hydration.
